zh.lifeSummary: 當John Vawdrey於大約1501年出生在英國英格蘭爾包頓時，他的父親Robert Vawdrey38歲，母親Alice Bereton33歲。他和Miss Reddish至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Vawdrey于大约1501年出生在英国英格兰爾包頓时，他的父亲Robert Vawdrey38岁，母亲Alice Bereton33岁。他和Miss Reddish至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他埋葬在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可。

nameMeanings.name: Vawdrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vaudrey
meanings: French, Huguenot: (i) locative name from Vaudrey (Jura). (ii) relationship name possibly in some cases an anglicized spelling of Vaudré(e), from the Germanic personal name Waldrad, composed of waldan ‘ruler’ + rad ‘counsel’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Vawdrey was born about 1501, in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Vawdrey, was 38 and his mother, Alice Bereton, was 33. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Miss Reddish. He was buried in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Vawdrey est né environ 1501, à Bowdon, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Vawdrey, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alice Bereton, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Miss Reddish. Ilenterré à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Vawdrey um 1501 in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Vawdrey 38 und seine Mutter Alice Bereton 33. Er hatte mit Miss Reddish mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er wurde in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Miss Reddish. Fu sepolto a Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Vawdreyが約1501年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボウドンで生まれた時，父Robert Vawdreyは38歳，母Alice Beretonは33歳であった。彼はMiss Reddishとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Vawdrey(이)가 대략 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보우던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Vawdrey(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Bereton(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Miss Reddish(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에 묻혔다.
